Word forms (FI): toimia; hoitaa; varmistaa; tiedustella; kysyä; tarjota; ottaa huomioon; huomata; jatkaa
Word forms (EN): to act; to handle; to make sure; to ask/check; to ask; to offer; to consider; to notice; to continue
Exam use (EN): Action keyword. It appears in questions asking what the driver should do: toimia, hoitaa, varmistaa, tiedustella, tarjota or ottaa huomioon.

Word forms (FI): avustaminen; avustaa; avustaja; erityisryhmä; erityistarve; liikuntarajoitteinen; liikuntavammainen; hoitolaitos; hoitohenkilökunta
Word forms (EN): assistance; to assist; assistant/helper; special group; special need; mobility-restricted; physically disabled; care institution; care staff
Exam use (EN): Assistance keyword. Link with erityisryhmä, liikuntarajoitteinen, avustaja, hoitolaitos and asking what help the customer needs.

Word forms (FI): pyörätuoli; pyörätuolin; pyörätuolissa; pyörätuolista; senioriskootteri; sähkömopo
Word forms (EN): wheelchair; of the wheelchair; in the wheelchair; from the wheelchair; mobility scooter; electric mobility scooter/moped
Exam use (EN): Wheelchair and mobility-device keyword. Link with avustaminen, nostin, kiinnitys, turvalaite, and turvallinen kuljetus. The exam logic is safe assistance, not speed.

Word forms (EN): visually impaired; visually impaired person as object; with a visually impaired person; blind; guide dog
Exam use (EN): Visually impaired passenger keyword. Link with sokea, opaskoira, kysyä tarvitseeko apua, ajoneuvon suunta, and clear guidance. Do not assume; ask and guide safely.

Word forms (EN): accessible transport; obstacle/barrier
Exam use (EN): Accessibility keyword. Link with esteetön kuljetus and este. Used in accessible taxi service and special passenger needs.

Word forms (EN): lift; passenger lift/person hoist
Exam use (EN): Lift keyword. Link with henkilönostin, pyörätuoli and safe boarding/unloading of mobility-impaired passengers.

Word forms (EN): to transfer; to transfer by oneself
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): working dog
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Näkövammainen / opaskoira questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): kieltäytyä; kieltää; ei suostu; halua; pelätä
Word forms (EN): to refuse; to forbid/deny; does not agree; wants/desires; to fear
Exam use (EN): Refusal keyword. Link with kieltäytyä, kieltää, ei suostu and halua. Often used when a customer refuses safety requirements or the driver may refuse unsafe service.

Word forms (FI): kiinnitys; kiinnittää; valjaat; paarit; selinmakuu; lastata; runko
Word forms (EN): securing/fastening; to fasten/secure; harness; stretcher; lying on back; to load; frame/body
Exam use (EN): Securing/fastening keyword. Link with kiinnittää, valjaat, paarit, selinmakuu and pyörätuolin kiinnitys. Correct securing is a major safety clue.

Word forms (FI): handsfree; viestimet; handsfree-laite; handsfree laitetta; puhelin; puhelimeen; puheluita
Word forms (EN): hands-free device; communication devices; hands-free device; hands-free device as object; phone; into/on phone; calls
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Puhelin / viestimet questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): with language skill; sufficient language skill
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Communication / kielitaito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): kuulovammainen; kuulovammaisen; kuuro; huuli; huulilta lukeminen; kommunikointi
Word forms (EN): hearing impaired; of the hearing-impaired person; deaf; lip; lip-reading; communication
Exam use (EN): Hearing-impaired passenger keyword. Link with kuuro, kuulovammainen, huuli, kommunikointi, and writing/clear communication if speech is not enough.

Word forms (EN): in writing
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Communication / kielitaito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): ; away from; to leave/exit
Exam use (EN): Use poispäin/poistua in movement or exit situations, especially when a passenger or wheelchair must move safely away from the vehicle or danger.

Word forms (FI): lapsi; lapsen; lasta; lasten; alle 15-vuotias; 15 ikävuoteen asti; huoltaja; yksin matkustava lapsi
Word forms (EN): child; of the child; child as object; children’s; under 15 years old; until age 15; guardian; child travelling alone
Exam use (EN): Child-passenger keyword. Link with yksin matkustava lapsi, alle 15-vuotias, huoltaja, turvavyö, and safely reaching sisätila/perille. The driver has stronger care responsibility.

Word forms (FI): turvavyö; turvavyön; turvavyötä; turvavyön käyttö; turvalaite; turvaistuin; vyö
Word forms (EN): seat belt; of the seat belt; seat belt as object; use of seat belt; safety device; child safety seat; belt
Exam use (EN): Seat-belt safety keyword. Link with lapsi, alle 15-vuotias, kiinnittää turvavyö, suostua/ei suostu. The safe answer often requires stopping first and continuing only when turvavyö is kiinni.

Word forms (FI): alkolukko; alkolukkoa; alkolukko vaaditaan; pakollinen varuste
Word forms (EN): alcohol interlock; alcohol interlock as object; alcohol interlock is required; mandatory equipment
Exam use (EN): Alcohol-interlock keyword. Link with koulu- ja päivähoitokuljetus, pakollinen varuste and kuljettaja on nauttinut alkoholia. It prevents driving when alcohol is detected.

Word forms (EN): school; school transport; day care; day-care transport; criminal-record extract
Exam use (EN): School/day-care transport keyword. Link with koulukuljetus, päivähoitokuljetus, alkolukko, rikostaustaote and child safety duties.

Word forms (EN): is prevented; is prevented/stopped
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): 120 cm tall; under 135 cm tall
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): installed
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): in advance
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): report the matter; to the school/institution
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): late; to have time/manage
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): ajoneuvo; auto; autossa; autoon; autosta; etuistuin; takapenkki; tavaratila; turvatyyny; istuinpaikkaluku; ajovalot; jarru
Word forms (EN): vehicle; car; in the car; into the car; out of the car; front seat; back seat; boot/trunk; airbag; number of seats; headlights; brake
Exam use (EN): Vehicle keyword. Link with auto, istuinpaikkaluku, etuistuin, takapenkki, tavaratila, turvatyyny and vehicle equipment/safety.

Word forms (FI): liikenneturvallisuus; liikenneturvallisuuden; turvallinen; turvallisesti; vaara; välttämätön; turvallisuusmääräys
Word forms (EN): traffic safety; of traffic safety; safe; safely; danger; necessary; safety regulation
Exam use (EN): Core safety trigger. In stopping, reversing, route, speed, or passenger-request questions, choose the option that protects liikenneturvallisuus and avoids vaarantaa muuta liikennettä.

Word forms (FI): liikenne; tienkäyttäjä; liikennemerkki; vaikutusalue; liikennekelpoisuus; liikennekäyttäytyminen
Word forms (EN): traffic; road user; traffic sign; area of effect; roadworthiness; traffic behaviour
Exam use (EN): Traffic keyword. Link with liikennemerkki, tienkäyttäjä, vaikutusalue, liikennekelpoisuus and legal road use.

Word forms (FI): pysähtyä; pysähtyminen; pysäyttää; pysähtymiskielto; poistua; poistuminen
Word forms (EN): to stop; stopping; to stop something/vehicle; no-stopping rule/sign; to exit/leave; exit/leaving
Exam use (EN): Stopping keyword. Link with pysähtyminen, pysäyttää, pysähtymiskielto and turvallinen poistuminen. The safest legal stop is often the correct answer.

Word forms (FI): ajotapa; ennakoiva ajotapa; nopeus; ylinopeus; keli; pimeä aika; yöaika; pakkanen; hitaasti
Word forms (EN): driving style; anticipatory driving; speed; speeding; road/weather condition; dark time; night-time; freezing weather; slowly
Exam use (EN): Driving-style keyword. Link with ennakoiva ajotapa, nopeus, ylinopeus, keli, pimeä aika and safe driving in conditions.

Word forms (EN): safe distance; keeping a safe distance
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Ajotapa / nopeus / turvaväli questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): to obey/follow; following/obeying
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Luvat / työaika / viranomaiset questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Meaning (EN): right side; on the right side
Word forms (EN): on the right side;
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Yleinen taksinkuljettajan velvollisuus questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): parking disc as object; parking disc, colloquial
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): police; of the police; to the police; authority; traffic/controller/supervisor
Exam use (EN): Authority keyword. In traffic-control questions, follow the poliisi/viranomainen instruction. In drunk/aggressive passenger questions, call or contact police only when the situation cannot be managed safely.

Word forms (FI): hätätilanne; hätäkeskus; hätänumero; ensiapu; ensiaputoimenpide; sairauskohtaus; hengitystiet; kylkiasento
Word forms (EN): emergency; emergency response centre; emergency number; first aid; first-aid measure; medical attack/seizure; airways; recovery position
Exam use (EN): Emergency keyword. Link with hätäkeskus, hätänumero, ensiapu, hengitystiet, kylkiasento and sairauskohtaus. In exam logic, secure the situation and call help when necessary.

Word forms (FI): päihtynyt; humalainen; alkoholi; alkoholia; rattijuopumus; uloshengitysilma
Word forms (EN): intoxicated/drunk; drunk person; alcohol; alcohol as object; drunk driving; exhaled air
Exam use (EN): Use this for drunk passenger situations: päihtynyt/humalainen asiakas, aggressiivinen käyttäytyminen, häiriö, rauhallisesti toimiminen. If the situation cannot be handled safely, the exam logic may lead to poliisi.

Meaning (EN): to be guilty of / commit an offence
Word forms (EN): has committed / is guilty of; offence/crime
Exam use (EN): Use syyllistyä/syyllistynyt in legal responsibility or offence contexts.

Word forms (EN): aggressively; to aggression
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Hätätilanne / poliisi / ensiapu questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): nukahtaneena; nukahtanut; nukahtaneena, hereille; nukahtaneena; hereille
Word forms (EN): as fallen asleep; fallen asleep; ; while/as asleep; awake
Exam use (EN): Use nukahtaa/nukahtanut when a passenger has fallen asleep or cannot respond. It often connects with safety, waking the passenger, or asking for help if the situation cannot be handled.

Word forms (EN): to the accident scene; of the accident scene
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Hätätilanne / poliisi / ensiapu questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): to gross endangerment of traffic safety
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Luvat / työaika / viranomaiset questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): a car that has driven off the road; has driven off the road; driving off the road
Exam use (EN): Use ulosajo/ulosajanut in accident or emergency contexts.

Word forms (EN): receipt; receipt as object/of receipt; offering a receipt
Exam use (EN): Receipt keyword. Link with kuitin tarjoaminen. In payment questions, remember that the customer must be offered a receipt when required.

Word forms (FI): maksu; maksaa; maksukortti; maksuväline; käteinen; vaihtoraha; omavastuu; omavastuu
Word forms (EN): payment; to pay; payment card; payment method; cash; change; deductible/customer share; customer share/deductible
Exam use (EN): Payment keyword. Link with maksukortti, käteinen, maksuväline, vaihtoraha and omavastuu.

Word forms (EN): price/fare; about the price; to charge; affordable/cheaper; cleaning extra fee
Exam use (EN): Price/fare keyword. Link with hinta, veloittaa, edullinen, siivouslisämaksu and extra charges. Used when deciding what can be charged from the customer.

Meaning (EN): Kela / Finnish social insurance institution; Kela / Social Insurance Institution of Finland
Word forms (EN): from Kela ride; Kela-reimbursed
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Kela / vakiotaksi questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): soils/makes dirty
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): written authorisation
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Meaning (EN): to revoke / cancel; to reverse / to cancel
Word forms (EN): for revocation; can revoke
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Turvavyö / lapsi / turvalaite questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): perille; määränpää; osoite; sijainti; päästä perille; sisätila; päästä sisätilaan
Word forms (EN): to destination; destination; address; location; to arrive/reach destination; indoor area; get indoors
Exam use (EN): Destination keyword. Link with määränpää, osoite, sijainti, päästä perille and sisätila. Important with children, disabled passengers and safe drop-off.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (FI): reitti; kartta; navigaattori; oikaista; lyhyt; ruuhka
Word forms (EN): route; map; navigator/GPS; to take a shortcut; short; traffic jam
Exam use (EN): Route keyword. Link with reitti, navigaattori, kartta, oikaista, ruuhka and customer’s chosen route versus safe/legal driving.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (FI): matkaa; matkatavara; matkavaroita; matkatavaroiden; painavia matkatavaroita; matkaa; matkan; matkalla
Word forms (EN): “journey/trip”; luggage; luggage as object; of the luggage; heavy luggage; trip/journey as object; of the trip; during the trip
Exam use (EN): Use matka for taxi ride/trip questions. Related forms like matkaa and matkatavara appear with route, passenger journey, fare, luggage and assistance contexts.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (EN): to choose; when choosing
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (EN): asks; has asked; by request
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Exam use (EN): Use this word in Pyörätuoli / esteetön / special assistance questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (EN): primarily / preferably; primarily / first of all; primarily; primarily / first of all / preferably
Exam use (EN): Use ensisijainen/ensisijaisesti when the question asks what should be done first or what is the preferred action. In exam logic it points to priority order.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (EN): travels / goes; to travel
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Meaning (EN): to leave / to go / to start moving
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Turvavyö / lapsi / turvalaite questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Set: Trip, Route, Luggage & Useful Action Words
Word forms (EN): ; practical judgement / ability to read the situation
Exam use (EN): Pelisilmä means practical judgement: choosing the sensible action in a customer or traffic situation, not just following words mechanically.

Word forms (EN): taxi driver; driver; regular taxi; dispatch/intermediary company; mainland Finland
Exam use (EN): Driver/operator keyword. Link with kuljettaja, taksinkuljettaja, vakiotaksi and tilausvälitysyhtiö.

Word forms (FI): vastuu; vastuulla; vastata; velvollisuus; oikeus; oikeutettu; määräys; vaatimus; seuraamus
Word forms (EN): responsibility; under responsibility; to be responsible/answer; obligation; right; entitled; regulation/order; requirement; consequence
Exam use (EN): Responsibility/legal-duty keyword. Link with vastuulla, velvollisuus, oikeus, määräys and vaatimus. Use it to decide who must do what.

Word forms (FI): ajolupa; ajoluvan; ajolupaa; liikennelupa; voimassa; terveysvaatimus; lääkärintarkastus; myöntää; suorittaa
Word forms (EN): taxi driving permit; of the permit; permit as object; transport licence; valid/in force; health requirement; doctor’s examination; to grant/issue; to complete/perform
Exam use (EN): Permit/licence keyword. Link with ajolupa, liikennelupa, voimassa, terveysvaatimus and suorittaminen. Used in legal right-to-drive/service questions.

Word forms (FI): työaika; tauko; työnantaja; työsuhde; irtisanomisaika; ajopäiväkirja
Word forms (EN): working time; break; employer; employment relationship; notice period; driving logbook
Exam use (EN): Work-rule keyword. Link with työaika, tauko, työnantaja, työsuhde, irtisanomisaika and ajopäiväkirja.
Use this word in Maksu / kuitti / hinta questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): to an approved; separately approved
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Lapsi + turvavyö / safety questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (EN): to a permitted place
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Liikennesäännöt / ajotapa questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Word forms (FI): asiakas; matkustaja; asiakkaan pyyntö; asiakastilanne; henkilö
Word forms (EN): customer; passenger; customer’s request; customer situation; person
Exam use (EN): Customer/passenger keyword. Link with asiakkaan pyyntö, asiakastilanne, matkustaja, and safe service. The customer can request many things, but safety and law still decide the best answer.

Word forms (FI): palvelu; palvelusta; palveluun; asiakaspalvelu; huono palvelu; palvelun taso; palvelunumero; palvelutapa; laatuvaatimus; matkustusmukavuus
Word forms (EN): service; about/from service; to service; customer service; poor service; service level; service number; service method/manner; quality requirement; travel comfort
Exam use (EN): Service-quality keyword. Group palvelun taso, palvelutapa and palvelunumero here. It appears in customer service and complaint questions where the driver must behave professionally.

Word forms (FI): asiallinen; asianmukainen; kohtelias; rauhallinen; keskustelu; tilannetaju; kommunikointi
Word forms (EN): appropriate/proper; appropriate/proper; polite; calm; discussion; situational awareness; communication
Exam use (EN): Professional-behaviour keyword. Link with asiallinen, asianmukainen, kohtelias, rauhallinen, keskustelu and tilannetaju.

Word forms (EN): complaint; to complain; incorrect/erroneous; problem; to apologise/regret
Exam use (EN): Complaint/error keyword. Link with valitus, valittaa, virheellinen, ongelma and pahoitella. Used in customer complaint and correction situations.

Word forms (EN): lost property; lost-property office; handbag; wallet
Exam use (EN): Lost-property keyword. Link with käsilaukku, lompakko and löytötavaratoimisto. Used when belongings are left in the taxi.

Word forms (EN): bullying OCR form
Exam use (EN): Use this word in Koulu / päivähoito questions. Learn it as taxi-exam vocabulary together with its forms and related Finnish clue words.

Meaning (EN): words that connect, add, or choose between ideas
Word forms (EN): and; and / as well as; also; or
Exam use (EN): These words connect ideas. In exam questions, both connected parts may matter; do not ignore the second phrase after the connector.

Meaning (EN): words that explain the reason, content, or purpose
Word forms (FI): koska; sillä; jotta; että; siten että
Word forms (EN): because; because / for; so that / in order to; that; so that / in such a way that
Exam use (EN): These words often explain why the correct action is required, especially in safety, responsibility, and legal-rule questions.

Meaning (EN): words that make the answer depend on a condition or exception
Word forms (FI): jos; mikäli; ellei; vaikka; silloin kun; tarvittaessa
Word forms (EN): if; if / provided that; unless / if not; although / even if; when / in the situation where; if necessary / when needed
Exam use (EN): These words tell you the rule applies only under a condition, exception, or special situation. They are strong exam clues.

Meaning (EN): words that show timing, order, duration, or urgency
Word forms (FI): kun; kunnes; ennen kuin; sen jälkeen kun; mahdollisimman pian; viipymättä; välittömästi
Word forms (EN): when; until; before; after; as soon as possible; without delay; immediately
Exam use (EN): These words are useful in questions about safety, lost property, emergency actions, and sequence of actions.

Meaning (EN): words that change, limit, or strengthen the meaning
Word forms (FI): mutta; kuitenkin; vain; aina; ei koskaan; joka
Word forms (EN): but; however; only; always; never; who / which / what
Exam use (EN): These words can create traps because they reverse meaning, limit the rule, or make the statement too absolute.

Meaning (EN): words that ask for the correct thing, option, type, or meaning
Word forms (EN): what / which; what; which of two; what kind of
Exam use (EN): These words tell you the question asks for the correct option, action, thing, or type.

Meaning (EN): words that ask who is responsible, who has authority, or who is involved
Word forms (EN): who; whose / who is responsible; who has / with whom
Exam use (EN): These are among the most important taxi-exam question words because many questions ask about responsibility.

Meaning (EN): words that ask place, direction, source, cause, or limit
Word forms (EN): where / in which; from where / from what; to where / until what / for what
Exam use (EN): These words help identify whether the question asks location, origin/cause, destination, or limit.

Meaning (EN): words that ask time or how long something lasts
Word forms (EN): when; how long
Exam use (EN): These words are useful for parking, permit validity, waiting time, and time-limit questions.

Meaning (EN): words that ask reason, method, amount, or way of acting
Word forms (FI): miksi; miten; kuinka; paljonko; millä tavoin
Word forms (EN): why; how; how / how much / how long; how much; in what way / how
Exam use (EN): These words show whether the question asks for a reason, a method/action, or a number/amount.
